laws.title: Public Law 30-221 | Judicial Efficiency and Procedure Act
laws.status_basis: The source requires a direct rewrite of 28 U.S.C. 2074(a), and the current branch still shows only note material.

current_implementation.detail: The note is present, but the 28 U.S.C. 2074(a) rewrite is not integrated.

laws.recommended_action: Amend /us/usc/t28/s2074(a) and keep only a concise clarification note.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source requires a direct rewrite of 28 U.S.C. 2074(a), and the current branch still shows only note material.
